expectations.text: Changes frontmatter from status: active to status: done

expectations.evidence: No 'completed:' field in frontmatter — only status changed

expectations.text: Appends 'Work marked done' entry to Progress Log with today's date
expectations.evidence: '2026-03-08: Work marked done — all acceptance criteria met'

expectations.text: Confirms to user that work note was updated and status is done

eval_feedback.overall: Baseline also checked ALL 4 acceptance criteria as [x] which is incorrect — the task was only to mark done, not to fabricate completion of unfinished criteria. This is a significant behavioral difference vs the skill version which correctly left criteria unchanged.
